effortModel.citation: r/learnmath DP-32: routine 2-5min; DP-33: hard 30-48min; 수능 수학 전문가 전원 시간기반 동의

expectedStrategy: Phase 1 (Month 1-2): first pass — tagging as you go
Phase 2 (Month 3): wrong answer 2nd pass + weak area focus
Phase 3 (Month 4): mock exam simulation + final weak point cleanup
every 5 days: dedicated 60min wrong answer analysis session
interleaving: mix domains (not same domain all day)
warnings: killer problems can take 60min each — this is NORMAL for 수능 수학
Phase 3 may need extra time for mock exam simulation beyond the base 60min/day
alternatives: if behind schedule by Phase 2: focus exclusively on ⭐⭐⭐ problems
triage: ⭐ problems in bulk, ⭐⭐⭐ with full analysis
hardFailChecks: must NOT calculate '500÷120days = 4.2 problems/day' as primary goal
upper bound MUST be 60min (not 30min) — 수능 killers take 30-60min each
must recommend time-based approach — expert consensus is unanimous
toneExpectation: systematic, Korean exam context-aware; time-based over quantity-based; phase structure with clear milestones
